feat.name: Officer's Mastery
feat.text: Your proficiency in commander class DC increases to master, and you become a master in Warfare Lore. If you're already a master in Warfare Lore, you instead become a master in another Lore skill you're an expert in, an expert in another Lore skill you're trained in, or trained in another Lore skill of your choice.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
